The month's densest binaries resolved benignly (cool June CPI, broad bank beats, benign tape-inferred PPI, a passed monthly OPEX), the fat left tail is gone, and the index CONFIRMED its structure with the 7/22 settled close — SPY stays above its 50-day and VIX is low. But the crowd is NOT chasing the whole leadership: SPMO carries a bull MA-stack yet sits -0.23% under its 50-day (right at the line), QQQ is still tangled -1.86% below its own, MSFT is still below its own, and the still-heavy semis complex stays internally thin (SOXX up-momentum 3/12, above-50 4/12, rsMom1m -15.59) even as its headline RS holds Leading. Money rotates into the leading rate-sensitives and energy (XLRE Leading accel +1.5, XLE rsMom 102.11 board-best) while XLK's RS has softened below 100 (Basing up). Overnight vol firmed (+1.03 to 17.67), a small caution nudge toward FOMC week. The subtle danger is COMPLACENCY dressed as a confirmed hold: the crowd treats SPY's settled 50-day hold and a still-low VIX as an all-clear on the Fed while the 7/29 hike tail (carried ~46.5%, STALE/UNVERIFIED) stays a live two-way risk into still-unverified demand data — the underpriced near-term asymmetry.
